examples: Ultrafine powder with a rosy tinge gives the skin warmth and luminosity.

Ultrafine diamond (UFD) is a hybrid product of explosion mechanics and material science.
For this study they also looked at even tinier particles: so-called 'ultrafine' particles or PM 0.1s.
Ultrafine particulate matter refers to nanoscale particulate matter, smaller than 0.1 micron (100 nanometers) in size.
